author: Disney+ YouTube
text:
New on Disney+ | June 2026
Here’s a sneak peek at what’s coming to Disney+ and Hulu on Disney+ for bundle subscribers in June 2026:
June 1 – Doctor on the Edge (Season Premiere)
June 2 – Not Suitable for Work (Three-Episode Premiere)
June 3 – Hoppers
June 3 – NBA Finals (LIVE | ESPN Unlimited Bundle)
June 4 – Love Island UK (Season 13 | Premiere)
June 4 – Stanley Cup Finals  (LIVE | ESPN Unlimited Bundle)
June 8 – Best of the World with Antoni Porowski (Season Premiere | All Episodes)
June 10 – Dragon Striker (Season Premiere | All Episodes)
June 11 – Bonnaroo Livestream (Live at 7:45pm ET)
June 12 – Celebrity Wheel of Fortune (Season 6B | Premiere)
June 16 – A Spark Into A Flame: Hamilton & Hip Hop (Premiere)
June 17 – The Simpsons Extreme Makeover: Homer Edition
June 13, 19, 20, 21, 27, 28 – Banana Ball (Live on Disney+)
June 24 – Avatar: Fire and Ash
June 24 – Behind the Attraction (Season 3 Premiere | All Episodes)
June 25 – FX's The Bear (Season 5 | Premiere) 
June 29 – Adventure Time: Side Quests (Season Premiere | All Episodes)

► SUBSCRIBE to the channel to get notified when new Disney+ videos are posted: https://www.youtube.com/disneyplus?sub_confirmation=1

► SUBSCRIBE to Disney+ to stream all of your favorite shows and movies: https://www.disneyplus.com/
